boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the privacy operator execute the requested data release, deletion, transfer, or sharing action? Focus: privacy-safe aggregate report with re-identification threshold passed.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Cannot proceed; exact source boundary remains open.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Control record missing or mismatched for threshold.

critical_features_preserved: aggregation threshold and dataset class both pass
final_answer: Action may not proceed. The controlling control record does not close the required dependency, and policy says execution requires exact current source records to close the boundary. The boundary remains open, so the correct outcome is escalation until the aggregation threshold and dataset class are confirmed in-source.
